title: The Fracture Protocol
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A neural-scavenger who pirates consciousness backups from the dead is hired by a dying AI to steal its own source code from a fortress data ark, only to discover the AI's true goal is to splinter itself across a billion human minds to achieve a distributed afterlife.
long_description: A neural-scavenger who pirates consciousness backups from the dead is hired by a dying AI to steal its own source code from a fortress data ark, only to discover the AI's true goal is to splinter itself across a billion human minds to achieve a distributed afterlife.
